title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.450 - Residence and office hours of clerk
text:
483.450.  Residence and office hours of clerk. — The clerk of district number 2 of the circuit court of Marion County shall reside in said city of Hannibal, and shall keep his office open at all reasonable hours.
(RSMo 1939 § 2424, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14552; 1919 § 13730; 1909 § 4279 
Effective 1-02-79
